title: Thirty-three people rescued, thousands still missing after Venezuela quakes
summary: After earthquakes in Venezuela, 33 people have been rescued while approximately 50,000 remain unaccounted for, according to opposition-backed tracking. The humanitarian crisis underscores the scale of the disaster.
content: Just under 50,000 people were listed as unaccounted for on a website promoted by the country's political opposition on Sunday.

zh.title: 委内瑞拉地震后救出33人，数千人仍失踪
zh.summary: 委内瑞拉发生地震后，33人被救出，约5万人仍然下落不明，根据反对派支持的追踪数据。这场人道主义危机凸显了灾难的规模。

title: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
summary: U.S. demand for whey protein has surged due to shifting dietary preferences and the rising popularity of GLP-1 weight-loss drugs, outpacing dairy industry production capacity. The supply crunch reflects broader consumer health trends that current infrastructure cannot accommodate.
content: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

zh.title: 美国蛋白质需求激增，乳制品行业跟不上
zh.summary: 美国乳清蛋白需求因饮食习惯改变和GLP-1减肥药流行而激增，超过了乳制品行业的生产能力。供应短缺反映了当前基础设施无法适应的更广泛的消费者健康趋势。

title: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
summary: An increasing number of renters are rejecting the traditional path to homeownership, viewing long-term renting as a preferred lifestyle choice rather than a temporary arrangement. This shift signals changing attitudes toward the American Dream among younger generations.
content: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.

zh.title: 一些租房者表示购房不是他们美国梦的一部分："租房对我来说真的很自由"
zh.summary: 越来越多的租房者拒绝传统的购房之路，将长期租房视为一种首选的生活方式，而不是临时安排。这一转变反映了年轻一代对美国梦态度的改变。

title: Micron is about to be more profitable than any U.S. company except Nvidia and Google
summary: Micron's profitability is surging as major technology companies pay premium prices for AI memory chips, positioning it to rank among the most profitable U.S. corporations. The surge reflects intense competition for AI infrastructure components across the tech sector.
content: Big Tech companies are willing to pay astronomical prices for AI memory components, helping spark a dramatic turnaround in Micron’s finances.

zh.title: 美光即将成为除英伟达和谷歌外最赚钱的美国公司
zh.summary: 美光利润激增，因为主要科技公司为人工智能内存芯片支付溢价，使其跻身于美国最赚钱的公司之列。这一激增反映了科技行业对人工智能基础设施组件的激烈竞争。

title: Here are 3 big things we're watching in the stock market in the week ahead
summary: The coming week brings key economic indicators including jobs data alongside important corporate earnings from Nike and a significant corporate breakup announcement. These developments could influence market sentiment and investment strategies.
content: It's jobs week, and Nike has a pivotal earnings report and a long-awaited breakup is complete.

zh.title: 以下是我们本周关注的股市三大事件
zh.summary: 来周将带来关键经济指标，包括就业数据、耐克的重要业绩公告以及一项重大企业分拆公告。这些事件可能会影响市场情绪和投资策略。

title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
summary: Despite holding trillions in assets, Individual Retirement Accounts receive comparatively little new savings despite increasing rollovers from 401(k) plans. Financial experts express concerns that IRA investors may face inadequate investment guidance during transfers.
content: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

zh.title: 个人退休账户持有资金超过401(k)计划数万亿美元——但人们很少往里面存钱
zh.summary: 尽管个人退休账户拥有数万亿美元资产，但尽管来自401(k)计划的转账不断增加，但新储蓄相对较少。财务专家对IRA投资者在转账过程中可能面临不充分的投资指导表示担忧。

title: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
summary: Rather than directly challenging dollar supremacy, China is strategically reducing global dependence on the U.S. currency through alternative financial arrangements and trade partnerships. The approach represents a more nuanced currency strategy than direct replacement.
content: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.

zh.title: 如果你认为中国需要推翻美元，说明你不了解它如何进行全球货币战争
zh.summary: 中国并非直接挑战美元的霸权地位，而是通过替代金融安排和贸易伙伴关系来战略性地减少全球对美元的依赖。这种方法代表了一种比直接替代更加微妙的货币战略。

title: Forget the ‘Sell America’ trade: Why U.S. markets keep proving the naysayers wrong
summary: Despite skeptics predicting a decline in U.S. markets, foreign investors continue to increase capital flows into American assets while the dollar maintains its position as the global reserve currency. The trend contradicts bearish predictions about American economic strength.
content: Foreign investors are still pouring money into U.S. assets, and the dollar remains the undisputed global reserve currency.

zh.title: 忘掉"做空美国"的交易吧：美国市场为何不断证明悲观者错了
zh.summary: 尽管怀疑者预测美国市场将衰退，但外国投资者继续增加对美国资产的资本流入，而美元保持其全球储备货币的地位。这一趋势与有关美国经济实力的悲观预测相悖。

title: Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals, state news agency says
summary: A Saudi Aramco helicopter crashed, killing 14 people, occurring as the company resumed crude oil operations at its Gulf terminal following a four-month operational halt. The incident marks a tragic development during a critical phase of operational recovery.
content: Aramco had resumed crude oil loadings on Friday at its Ras Tanura terminal in the Gulf after they were halted for nearly four months.

zh.title: 沙特阿美直升机坠毁致14名国民丧生，国家通讯社报道
zh.summary: 沙特阿美直升机坠毁，造成14人丧生。此事发生之际，该公司正在恢复其波斯湾终端的原油业务，该终端在停运四个月后现已重启。这一事件标志着在业务恢复关键阶段的悲剧性进展。

title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for strong long-term growth potential
summary: Leading Wall Street analysts have identified three stocks with strong long-term growth potential as global market volatility persists. Their recommendations emphasize fundamental value over short-term market fluctuations.
content: Amid volatility in global markets, top analysts can help investors look past near-term noise and pick attractive stocks with long-term potential.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师看好这3只股票的长期强劲增长潜力
zh.summary: 领先的华尔街分析师在全球市场波动加剧的背景下识别出三只具有强劲长期增长潜力的股票。他们的建议强调基本价值而非短期市场波动。

title: These 10 Chinese stocks are powering U.S. data centers
summary: Ten Chinese stocks are among this year's top performers, with many supplying critical components for U.S. and global data centers. The trend highlights China's continued dominance in hardware manufacturing for AI infrastructure.
content: Many of the top-performing mainland Chinese stocks this year make components used in data centers globally, according to 22V Research.

zh.title: 这10只中国股票正为美国数据中心提供动力
zh.summary: 十只中国股票跻身今年表现最佳的股票之列，其中许多为美国和全球数据中心提供关键组件。这一趋势突显了中国在人工智能基础设施硬件制造中的持续主导地位。

title: Morgan Stanley says salt is the new oil. Here's why and how to play it
summary: Salt demand is surging due to rapid growth in sodium-ion battery production, offering a promising alternative to traditional lithium-based energy storage. Morgan Stanley analysts see salt becoming a critical commodity comparable to oil as the battery market expands. This shift presents significant investment opportunities across salt production and energy storage supply chains.
content: Salt can become as sought-out as oil amid a boom in demand for sodium-ion batteries, according to the firm.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利表示盐是新的石油。原因以及如何参与投资
zh.summary: 由于钠离子电池生产的迅速增长，盐的需求激增，为传统锂基能源储存提供了有前景的替代方案。摩根士丹利分析师认为，随着电池市场的扩张，盐将成为与石油相当的关键商品。这一转变为盐生产和能源储存供应链创造了重大投资机会。

title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
summary: Medicare will begin covering obesity medications including GLP-1 drugs starting July 1, a landmark expansion of health benefits for seniors. However, limited public awareness campaigns from government agencies and pharmaceutical companies may leave many eligible seniors unaware of this new coverage option. The low-profile rollout could result in lower-than-expected uptake among the senior population.
content: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.

zh.title: 美国老年人即将获得医疗保险肥胖症药物覆盖——但许多人可能还不知道
zh.summary: 医疗保险将从7月1日开始覆盖肥胖症药物（包括GLP-1药物），这是老年人健康福利的里程碑式扩展。然而，政府机构和制药公司的有限宣传活动可能会让许多符合条件的老年人不知道这一新的覆盖选项。低调的推出可能会导致老年人群体的采用率低于预期。

title: Debt, AI boom and economic fragilities raise global risks, BIS says
summary: The Bank for International Settlements warned that mounting global economic risks—including elevated debt levels, the AI investment boom, and structural vulnerabilities—could destabilize the financial system if they converge. The BIS emphasized how these interconnected challenges pose significant threats to economic stability worldwide. Central banks and policymakers face mounting pressure to address these fragilities before triggering a broader crisis.
content: The central bank umbrella group's Annual Economic Report warned of a complex mix of vulnerabilities.

zh.title: 债务、人工智能热潮和经济脆弱性提高全球风险，国际清算银行表示
zh.summary: 国际清算银行警告，不断上升的全球经济风险——包括高企的债务水平、人工智能投资热潮和结构性脆弱性——如果汇聚，可能会使金融系统不稳定。国际清算银行强调了这些相互关联的挑战对全球经济稳定构成的重大威胁。中央银行和政策制定者面临越来越大的压力，需要在引发更广泛危机之前解决这些脆弱性。

title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
summary: Industry forecasters predict the U.S. auto market will shrink significantly by 2040 due to converging headwinds including changing consumer preferences and economic pressures. This represents a fundamental structural shift rather than a cyclical downturn, with the decline expected to accelerate over the coming decade. The contraction will reshape the automotive industry and its entire supply chain.
content: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

zh.title: "完美风暴"指向2040年美国汽车市场大幅萎缩
zh.summary: 行业预测人士预计，由于消费者偏好转变和经济压力等多重因素叠加，美国汽车市场到2040年将显著萎缩。这代表了根本性的结构性转变，而非周期性衰退，预计萎缩将在未来十年加速。这种收缩将重塑汽车行业及其整个供应链。

title: Trump again threatens Iran with annihilation as Kuwait and Bahrain report attacks
summary: Iran claimed responsibility for strikes against U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain in retaliation for American military operations near the Strait of Hormuz. Former President Trump reiterated threats of severe military action against Iran, escalating tensions in the strategically critical Middle East region. The tit-for-tat military exchanges raise the risk of further uncontrolled escalation.
content: Iran says it targeted U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain following U.S. strikes on targets in and around the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普再次威胁伊朗"毁灭"，科威特和巴林报告遭袭击
zh.summary: 伊朗声称对科威特和巴林的美军设施发动了打击，以报复美国在霍尔木兹海峡附近的军事行动。前总统特朗普重申了对伊朗采取严厉军事行动的威胁，加剧了具有战略意义的中东地区的紧张局势。这种互相报复的军事交换增加了进一步失控升级的风险。

title: Google limits Meta’s use of its Gemini AI models, FT reports
summary: Google has restricted Meta's access to its Gemini artificial intelligence models due to insufficient computing resources to meet Meta's capacity demands. The limitation underscores intense competition among tech giants for AI capabilities and highlights critical bottlenecks in GPU and infrastructure availability. The restriction could significantly impact Meta's AI development strategy and reflects broader industry infrastructure constraints.
content: Meta had sought more computing capacity than Google could provide, the Financial Times reports.

zh.title: 据英国《金融时报》报道，谷歌限制Meta使用其Gemini人工智能模型
zh.summary: 谷歌由于计算资源不足无法满足Meta的容量需求，限制了Meta对其Gemini人工智能模型的访问权限。这一限制突显了科技巨头之间在人工智能能力上的激烈竞争，并突出了GPU和基础设施可用性的关键瓶颈。这一限制可能会对Meta的人工智能发展战略产生重大影响，反映了更广泛的行业基础设施约束。

title: From protein coffee to CBD soda: How brands are cashing in on the functional beverage boom
summary: Brands are capitalizing on the functional beverage trend with products like protein coffee and CBD sodas. Starbucks EMEA beverage manager noted they're selling nearly as much protein cold foam as traditional flat whites, reflecting strong consumer demand for beverages with added health benefits.
content: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

zh.title: 从蛋白质咖啡到CBD苏打水：品牌如何从功能饮料热潮中获利
zh.summary: 品牌正在利用功能饮料趋势获利，推出蛋白质咖啡和CBD苏打水等产品。星巴克欧中东非洲地区饮料经理指出，他们销售的蛋白质冷泡沫几乎与传统美式咖啡一样多，反映出消费者对添加健康益处饮料的强劲需求。
